ham.subject: Upcoming Azure Data Platform Maintenance – March 20, 2026
ham.body:
Dear Azure Operations Team,

We would like to inform you about the upcoming scheduled maintenance window for the Azure Data Platform that will take place on Wednesday, March 20, 2026, from 02:00 UTC to 06:00 UTC. During this time, services such as Azure SQL Database, Cosmos DB, and Blob Storage may experience brief interruptions. The maintenance includes critical security and performance updates that have been requested by the service team.

Please ensure that any critical workloads are scheduled to run outside the maintenance window or have been backed up. If you need to reschedule or have questions, contact the Azure Support Center at support@cloudservices.example.com or call 1‑800‑CLOUD‑123.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Azure Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Azure Account Will Be Suspended in 24 Hours
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected suspicious activity in your Azure account. As a result, your account will be suspended in 24 hours unless you verify your identity. Failure to do so will permanently lock your subscription, causing any data stored in your Azure boxes to become inaccessible.

To verify your account, please click the link below and enter your login credentials as prompted:

<URL>

Once verification is complete, you will receive a confirmation email that restores full access. Additionally, a $150 credit will be applied to your next bill for verifying in time.

Act now! Failure to act will result in an irreversible suspension.

Best regards,
Azure Billing Support
